records.ety: [Skr. kāma love, the god of love.]

defs: The Hindu Cupid. He is represented as a beautiful youth, with a bow of sugar cane or flowers.

notes: supposed to create the ka"ma ru"pa (rp) [Skr. rūpa shape, image], a kind of simulacrum or astral likeness of a man which exists after his death in an invisible plane of being, called ka"ma lo"ca (lō"k) [Skr. lōka space, world], until the impulses which created it are exhausted and it finally fades away.
